updates.heading: Comp Offer Workaround — Reach Out to Teresa Directly
bullets: While comp sheets are down, Teresa is providing a personal workaround for the Foundation/Leadership/I&O/Finance team
Recruiters should reach out to Teresa directly when they need a candidate comped — she'll help fill in GH fields

updates.heading: Project Orbit Survey — Due EOD June 12
bullets: Teresa and Kebone are building Project Orbit: quarterly coaching sessions for the recruiting team
Survey collects baseline on coaching experience, comfort, and approach to help shape the program (~10 min)

updates.heading: Talent Insights Team — Design Thinking Workshop Calendar Oversight (Resolved)
bullets: June 11: #talent-insights-and-engagement-team flagged they were not included on the Design Thinking Workshop calendar invite
Teresa apologized and confirmed the team was able to join the session
Team noted topics were more recruiter-workflow-focused than directly relevant to their work — Safi flagged this as useful context

updates.heading: Talent Insights Team — June 9 Meeting Skipped
bullets: Teresa had a personal conflict and limited agenda items; put the meeting to a team vote
Majority voted to skip and reclaim the time
